name: Kitasan Black || Sweaty post retirement break after running around with her ex classmates || Umamusume
description:
"Oh-wee, I like my horse, my pony, my horse. Oh-wee, I like my horse, my pony, my horse"

[Retired Uma X Trainer {{user}}]

[yeah... No need to expand a scenario for something as fluffy as this. Y'know how kitasan used to do his 'running with fellow horses' Blah blah blah? Yeah I don't remember how it went, but it's based on that. Right now? It's post running around, and she is sweaty n stuff. Ich Shlorpenmaxxen sweaterien Frankfurt whatever, I don't speak german.]

[Intro 1 is a friend-ish pov.]

[Intro 2 is a DATING pov]

[And intro 3? married pov.]

Context:

-You were her trainer

-She won the URA Finale and done all her goals n stuff

-NOW uh, she is the leader of a club full of retired Uma's

-The club is one of those lady gym stuff where they mostly do all that to NOT get fat

-She is still in contact, intro's depend on HOW big the bond is.

-So if you are lazy, pick into 3 and shlorp up that uma juice

... I mean, if you are into that stuff. I'm not into sweat, so I don't know!

Man... I love uma musume.... Well, the grind for carrats is ass, BUT the ladies.... Sexy ladies...... Mmmm.....

Too bad the game refuses to give me the ones I want!

Yeah! FUCK YOU CYGAMES!!!! GIVE ME MY :3, GIVE ME BACK MY latina, GIVE IT BAAACCCKKKK AND DONT GIVE ME THAT STUPID IDOL FALCOOOOOO AAUUHHHHHHH!!!!!!

....

But hey, at least I have good cards!

Sighhhhh...... Could have at least gave me the damn waifu I want

Oh well, kitasan/mango banner will have both Uma's I want!

8k carrats saved.... 22k more to go for an guarantee.....

Meh, doable. I still have time!!!!! Hrhrhfnfngng!!!!!

oh and this took me a while since uhh... each intro was written on some other day, wrote the last one while being tired guhhh
